creator: FitchKendall@Gmail.com
text:
In FreeBSD 8.0-RELEASE (x64), the Intel ICH5 82801EB sound chip makes
no sound.  On same computer using FreeBSD 7.2-RELEASE (x86), the sound worked.


===========================
Output of cat /dev/sndstat
===========================
% cat /dev/sndstat
FreeBSD Audio Driver (newpcm: 64bit 2009061500/amd64)
Installed devices:
pcm0: <Intel ICH5 (82801EB)> at io 0xf2600400, 0xf2600600 irq 17 bufsz 16384 kld snd_ich [MPSAFE] (1p:4v/1r:4v channels duplex default)
%
===========================
Output of mixer values
===========================
%mixer
Mixer vol      is currently set to  75:75
Mixer pcm      is currently set to  78:78
Mixer line     is currently set to  77:77
Mixer mic      is currently set to  75:75
Mixer cd       is currently set to  78:78
Mixer rec      is currently set to  75:75
Mixer igain    is currently set to  20:20
Mixer ogain    is currently set to  20:20
Mixer line1    is currently set to  20:20
Mixer phin     is currently set to   0:0
Mixer phout    is currently set to   0:0
Recording source: mic
%

% sysctl hw.snd
hw.snd.feeder_rate_quality: 1
hw.snd.feeder_rate_round: 25

hw.snd.feeder_eq_presets: PEQ:16000,0.2500,62,0.2500:-9,9,1.0:44100,48000,88200,96000,176400,192000
hw.snd.vpc_reset: 0
hw.snd.vpc_0db: 45
hw.snd.vpc_autoreset: 1
hw.snd.latency_profile: 1
hw.snd.latency: 5
hw.snd.report_soft_matrix: 1
hw.snd.report_soft_formats: 1
hw.snd.compat_linux_mmap: 0
hw.snd.vpc_mixer_bypass: 1
hw.snd.verbose: 1
hw.snd.maxautovchans: 16
hw.snd.default_unit: 0
hw.snd.version: 2009061500/amd64
hw.snd.default_auto: 0
%

===========================

dev.pcm.0.%driver: pcm
dev.pcm.0.%location: slot=31 function=5
dev.pcm.0.%pnpinfo: vendor=0x8086 device=0x24d5 subvendor=0x103c subdevice=0x12f1 class=0x040100
dev.pcm.0.%parent: pci0
dev.pcm.0.eapd: 1
dev.pcm.0.play.vchans: 4
dev.pcm.0.play.vchanmode: fixed
dev.pcm.0.play.vchanrate: 48000
dev.pcm.0.play.vchanformat: s16le:2.0
dev.pcm.0.rec.vchans: 4
dev.pcm.0.rec.vchanmode: fixed
dev.pcm.0.rec.vchanrate: 48000
dev.pcm.0.rec.vchanformat: s16le:2.0
dev.pcm.0.buffersize: 16384
dev.pcm.0.bitperfect: 0
dev.pcm.0.ac97rate: 48000
[IR@pcbsd-5301]/home/IR(23)%

===========================
Sound-Related Device Output of dmesg
===========================

pcm0: <Intel ICH5 (82801EB)> port 0x5000-0x50ff,0x5400-0x543f mem 0xf2600400-0xf26005ff,0xf2600600-0xf26006ff irq 17 at device 31.5 on pci0
pcm0: [ITHREAD]
pcm0: <Analog Devices AD1981B AC97 Codec>

===========================
Output of kldload snd_ich
===========================

# kldload snd_ich
kldload: can't load snd_ich: File exists
#

===========================
Selected Output of pciconf -lv
===========================
% pciconf -lv                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
pcm0@pci0:0:31:5:       class=0x040100 card=0x12f1103c chip=0x24d58086 rev=0x02 hdr=0x00
    vendor     = 'Intel Corporation'
    device     = 'multimedia audio device (codec AC97) SoundMAX or VIA (8086)'
    class      = multimedia
    subclass   = audio
%

===========================
Contents of /boot/loader.conf:
===========================
# Load sound-support
sound_load="YES"
snd_uaudio_load="YES"

===========================
Contents of /etc/rc.conf:
===========================
# Enable sound-support
snddetect_enable="YES"
mixer_enable="YES"

How-To-Repeat: n/a as the problem is always there.
